calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, 3689.

Mark Hooshmand, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Mehrdad Jafarzadeh, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Fred Arezoumand.
Default entered against defendant on June 17, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on June 17, 2008

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Mehrdad Jafarzadeh, and against the Defaulted Defendant Fred Arezoumand as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100.00.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $15,167.50.
Costs - $885.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $126,052.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion An Dmotion For Order Of Contempt For Willful Violation Of Discovery Order By Deft Fred Arezoumand; Request For Issue, Evidentiary, Monetary And/Or Terminating Sanctions, Costs And Fees
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Mark Hooshmand, Esq., appeared for Plaintiff and moving party: Mehrdad Jafarzadeh
No other appearance.

RULING:
TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Mehrdad Jafarzadeh's Motion For Order Of Contempt For Willful Violation Of Discovery Order By Defendant Fred Arezoumand; Request For Issue, Evidentiary, Monetary and/or Terminating Sanctions, Costs, And Fees Against Defendant Fred Arezoumand is granted as it seeks terminating sanctions against Defendant Fred Arezoumand. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that additional orders to respond to discovery would not result in compliance. The court orders that the answer of Defendant Fred Arezoumand be stricken and judgment entered against Defendant Fred Arezoumand. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Defendant in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Trina Ayala, CSR#12964. Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Pltf For Order Compelling Response To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Request For Sanctions, Costs And Fees Pursuant To Ccp 2023.010(D), 2030.290(C) And 2031.300(B,C) As Against Deft Fred Arezoumand
Off Calendar Dec-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Mark Hooshmand, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Mehrdad Jafazadeh

No other appearance. Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff Mehrdad Jafarzadeh's Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $825, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
